name: hemp-homes-outreach
description: AI-drafted prospect outreach pipeline with manual approval (intro + 14-day follow-up).

env_vars.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Claude API key for polishing outreach drafts via @caistech/ai-client.
env_vars.where: Anthropic Console → API Keys (or share with the portfolio-wide key)

env_vars.name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Alternative LLM routing via OpenRouter. Either this or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY must be present; ANTHROPIC is preferred.

env_vars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
env_vars.description: Resend API for sending outreach emails. Already used by Seafields transactional sends.

env_vars.name: RESEND_FROM_EMAIL
env_vars.description: Sender override. Defaults to 'Factory2Key Hemp Homes <noreply@updates.corporateaisolutions.com>'. Must be a verified sender per the Email Infrastructure rule.

env_vars.name: RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET
env_vars.description: Svix signing secret for Resend webhook verification at /api/webhooks/resend.
env_vars.where: Resend dashboard → Webhooks → endpoint signing secret

env_vars.name: CRON_SECRET
env_vars.description: Bearer token validating Vercel cron route invocations. Also required by seafields-daily-digest.
env_vars.where: Generate locally and paste into Vercel env

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_CANONICAL_URL
env_vars.description: Canonical app URL used to construct OAuth redirect URIs + webhook endpoints (e.g. https://f2k-projects.vercel.app).
env_vars.where: Set in Vercel env to match the canonical hostname

env_vars.name: HEMP_HOMES_UNSUBSCRIBE_SECRET
env_vars.description: HMAC secret for signing unsubscribe tokens in outreach emails. Rotating it invalidates every previously-sent unsubscribe link.
env_vars.where: Generate locally and paste into Vercel env

external_setup.title: Resend webhook endpoint
external_setup.description: Registers the webhook receiver so delivery + open + click events flow back into hemp_homes_prospect_outreach.
steps: Events: email.delivered, email.bounced, email.complained, email.opened, email.clicked, email.failed
Save the endpoint, copy the Signing Secret
Add Vercel env var RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET with the signing secret as value

external_setup.title: Vercel cron config
external_setup.description: Daily evaluator cron entry in vercel.json (runs 23:00 UTC = 09:00 AWST).
steps: Confirm vercel.json contains a cron entry for /api/cron/hemp-homes-outreach-evaluate
Schedule '0 23 * * *' or earlier per AWST preference
